bullets: THRILLING FUTURISTIC BATTLE – Bring the excitement of laser tag to life with this 2-player set! Enjoy action-packed battles with blasters & target armour for realistic gameplay.
VIBRATION & SOUND EFFECTS – Feel the hit with every strike! The laser tag guns vibrate & emit combat sounds, creating a fully immersive experience that kids will love.
REAL-TIME STRIKE DETECTION – Each laser tag game for kids includes infra-red sensor armour that detects hits, making each battle intense & ensuring precise, fair play.
LONG-RANGE ACTION UP TO 15M – Perfect for both indoor & outdoor play, these laser guns for kids have a range of up to 15 metres, letting kids explore & strategise during gameplay.

PERFECT GIFT FOR ADVENTURE SEEKERS – Includes 2x Laser Tag Blasters, 2x Chest Armour Targets with adjustable straps and 1x Instruction Manual, making this lazer tag gun set a fantastic gift for birthdays or family fun!
content.description: You can have exciting futuristic combat gameplay at home with the Bladez TEK Electronic Lazer Tag 2-player combat set! Including 2x Lazer Tag Blasters and 2x Target Armour with infra-red sensors for accurate strike detection, this set is perfect for head to head action!

attributes.whats_in_box: 2 x Laser Tag Blasters, 2 x Chest Armour Targets, 1 x Instruction Manual

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.

_meta.source_file: New Item Setup Sheet 2025 - Bladez Toyz (January 2026).xlsx
